narrative:
Jackson B (precinct in Sandusky County) has 393 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.3 percentage points.
